name: Back Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-up on surface, sculling under hips

name: Front Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-down on surface, sculling by chest

name: Tub
description: Both legs pulled to chest, shins and feet parallel on surface

name: Ballet Leg
description: Back layout with one leg extended perpendicular to body

name: Inverted Tuck
description: Body curled in tuck position while inverted underwater

name: Support Scull
description: Forearms at 90 degrees, moved back and forth to support body

name: Propeller Scull
description: Propels the body headfirst across the surface

name: Eggbeater Kick
description: Alternating circular breaststroke kick for treading and lifting

name: Spin 180
description: Half rotation while in vertical position

name: Double Ballet Leg
description: Both legs extended and held perpendicular to the body

name: Flamingo
description: Ballet leg with bottom leg pulled into chest, shin touching knee

name: Crane
description: Vertical body, one leg vertical, other at 90-degree L shape

name: Back Tuck Somersault
description: From back layout, full 360-degree backward rotation

name: Porpoise
description: Rise to vertical position from a submerged approach

name: Tower
description: Front layout to pike, lift one leg to crane, other to vertical

name: Spin Up 360
description: Full ascending spin, rising while rotating 360 degrees

name: Torpedo Scull
description: Propels body feet-first in a streamlined position

name: Circle
description: All swimmers arranged in a ring, often rotating

name: Straight Line
description: All swimmers in a single row

name: Diagonal Line
description: Swimmers in an angled line across the pool

name: V-Formation
description: Swimmers in a V or chevron shape

name: Diamond
description: Four or more swimmers forming a diamond shape

name: Knight
description: Surface arch with one leg lifted to vertical

name: Split Position
description: Upside-down splits, one leg forward, one back on surface

name: Barracuda
description: From submerged back pike, rapid upward thrust to vertical

name: Front Walkover
description: Front layout through pike, crane, split to back layout in a continuous arc

name: Aurora
description: Front layout to somersault to submerged double ballet leg to knight

name: Ariana
description: Walkover back to split position, hips rotating 180 degrees

name: London
description: Ballet leg to partial somersault, trunk unrolls to vertical

name: Barrel Scull
description: Creates rotation of the body along its long axis

name: Combined Spin 360+360
description: Ascending spin followed by descending spin, 720 total

name: Twist 360
description: Full rotation at constant height, no ascending or descending

name: Balance Stack
description: Featured swimmer stands on support swimmers in head-up position

name: Platform Lift
description: Team forms stable base, featured swimmer lifted to pose

name: Star / Pinwheel
description: Swimmers radiating from center point in multi-armed pattern

name: Cyclone Open 180
description: Figure featuring an open 180-degree rotation

name: Swordfish Straight Leg
description: Figure with straight-leg Ariana rotation

name: Albatross Spin Up 360
description: Complex figure ending with 360-degree ascending spin

name: Flying Fish Spinning 360
description: Figure with a full 360-degree spinning movement

name: Airborne Throw
description: Swimmer thrown into the air, fully disconnecting from team

name: Platform with Dismount
description: Platform lift ending with a jump or dismount

name: Continuous Spin 720
description: Rapid descending spin of at least 720 degrees

name: Whip Continuous Spin 720
description: Figure culminating in a rapid descending 720-degree continuous spin

name: Barracuda Airborne Split
description: Barracuda with rocket split, rejoining vertical with 180 spin

name: Flamingo Combined 720
description: Flamingo with combined ascending and descending 720-degree spin

name: Combined Airborne-Balance
description: Combines airborne throw with balance stack in sequence

name: Rocket Split
description: Swimmer executes an airborne split during a throw or thrust

name: Continuous Spin 1080
description: Three full rapid descending rotations
